summary: Iteration 3 validation — Ride N' Nice landing. Backend pytest 6/6 pass (/api/, /api/join POST/GET, /api/events, validation). Frontend 54/54 assertions pass on desktop (1440x900) + mobile (390x844) on https://racing-routes.preview.emergentagent.com. All review_request bullets verified: (1) Nav has exactly 4 links (SOBRE NOSOTROS→#sobre-nosotros, GALERÍA→#galeria, MERCH→#merch, REDES→#redes); no RUTAS or EVENTOS. (2) Logo className='h-8 md:h-10 w-auto' — no 'invert' filter. (3) events-timeline-section & routes-carousel-section NOT in DOM. (4) Gallery section present with gallery-embla, 5 cards g-01..g-05, 5 dot indicators, prev/next cycle works. (5) Lightbox: opens on card click; closes via Esc, close button AND background click (stopPropagation on figure preserves center clicks). (6) Merch section with 4 cards (m-patch/m-stickers/m-caps/m-jacket) each pointing to Google Form URL with target='_blank' rel='noreferrer noopener'. (7) merch-cta is with Google Form href, text 'PEDIR MERCH', target='_blank' rel='noreferrer noopener'. (8) about-stats 4 cards: 660/MIEMBROS, 3/CONCENTRACIONES (sub '+ 4ª EN 2026'), FINDES/QUEDADAS (string rendered as-is, NOT animated), 2020/DESDE. (9) Social section has 3 links only: social-ig (instagram.com/ridennicegz), social-tt (tiktok.com/@ridennicegz), social-wa (https://chat.whatsapp.com/FliypGmR1S80FGFYvywcQE). No social-yt. (10) Hero CTA: hero-cta-galeria present (href=#galeria, text 'Ver galería'); hero-cta-rutas removed. (11) join-wa-shortcut with WA URL and target=_blank. (12) footer-wa-cta with WA URL; footer nav lists exactly: Sobre nosotros, Galería, Merch, Redes. (13) Backend regression passed — GET /api/, POST /api/join (valid + invalid email + missing fields), GET /api/events returns 4 events, GET /api/join persistence + no _id leak. (14) Mobile no horizontal overflow (sw=iw=390), stats grid 2x2 (170px 170px), merch grid 2 cols (165px 165px), gallery card ~300.95px (~77% of 390 — card is flex-[0_0_88%] but gap/padding trims; visually correct with neighbor peek).
critical_code_review_comments: Nav.jsx: the Únete CTA uses class 'group-hover:bg-black' but the parent anchor is not 'group', so the inner dot never changes color on hover. Minor visual nit.
Hero.jsx StartLights effect schedules 6 setTimeouts but cleanup only clears them once; because component stays mounted it's harmless but the pattern would leak if parent re-rendered. Not blocking.
Social.jsx: floating image preview uses fixed translate offsets that can briefly go off-viewport near the right edge on narrow desktop; consider clamping translateX within ref bounds. Non-blocking.

Gallery.jsx imports Maximize2 and X icons but the card overlay icon (Maximize2) is hidden until hover; fine. Lightbox also supports background click because only the inner <figure> stopPropagation — correctly implemented.
server.py unchanged — logger+basicConfig now at top of module (fixed in prior iteration). No outstanding backend issues.
seed_data_creation: None new. Prior TEST_ join requests remain harmlessly in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing composition: Hero → About (with full-width stats strip handling both numeric animated and string values) → Gallery (embla carousel + lightbox with Esc/close/background dismiss) → Merch (4 cards + main CTA all linking to Google Form) → Social (3 items: IG/TT/WA) → Join (form + WA shortcut) → Footer (WA cta + 4 nav links). lib/data.js contains LOGO_URL, HERO_BG, IMG, GALLERY(5), MERCH_FORM_URL, MERCH(4), TICKERS, WHATSAPP_URL, SOCIALS(3), STATS(660 number / 3 number+sub / 'FINDES' string / 2020 number). Backend unchanged since iteration 2. External URLs (IG, TikTok, WA, Google Form) only verified by href value — not actually navigated to.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found. All iteration 3 acceptance criteria verified.
